mapper.select: /* PointRecovery_SQL.selectCustPointTxn */ SELECT a.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo /* 서비스계약번호 */ ,b.POINT_CUST_SEQ AS pointCustSeq ,b.POINT_DIV_CD AS pointDivCd ,b.POINT_TRT_CD AS pointTrtCd ,b.POINT_GIVE_BASE_SEQ AS pointGiveBaseSeq ,b.POINT AS point ,a.TOT_REMAIN_POINT AS totRemainPoint ,b.POINT_TXN_RSN_CD AS pointTxnRsnCd ,b.POINT_TXN_DTL_RSN_DESC AS pointTxnDtlRsnDesc ,b.POINT_ALL_GIVE_SEQ AS pointAllGiveSeq ,b.USER_POINT_TRT_SEQ AS userPointTrtSeq ,b.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey ,b.POINT_TRT_DT AS pointTrtCd ,b.POINT_TRT_MEMO AS pointTrtMemo FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS@DL_MCP a, NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN@DL_MCP b WHERE a.POINT_CUST_SEQ = b.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND b.POINT_TRT_CD = 'U' AND b.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN@DL_MCP F /* 이미 원복된 row있을 경우 제외 */ WHERE F.POINT_TRT_CD = 'S' AND F.REQUEST_KEY = b.REQUEST_KEY )

/* PointRecovery_SQL.selectUsePointAmtOpenMgmtListDtl */ SELECT POI.POINT AS POINT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB ,MSP_REQUEST REQ ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN@DL_MCP POI WHERE SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = POI.REQUEST_KEY AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND POI.POINT_TRT_CD = 'U' AND ROWNUM = 1
